title: Oda oda oda dhooram lyrics mayakkam enna song lyrics
stanzas:
Song: Oda Oda Dhooram
Music : G.V.Prakash Kumar
Movie: Mayakkam Enna

Oda oda oda dhooram korayala
paada paada paada paattu mudiyala
poga poga poga onnum puriyala
aaga motham onnum velangala...

Freeya suthum pothu figure illaye
puducha figure-um ippo freeya illaye
Kaila bat-tu iruku ball-u illaye
Life pooram indha thollaye

Olagame speed-aa odi pogudhu
En vandi pancharaayi nikkudhu
Mokka piece-u kooda kindal pannudhu
Saami enna bangam pannudhu

Crack-ah maaritten, joker aayiten
Kundu sattiyila, rendu kudhura vandi ohtturen

Oru beach-ula, thaniya alanjen alanjen
Nadu road-ula, aluden poranden kilinjen
Baaram thaangala thaangala
Kazhudha naan illaye,
Jaanum yerala yerala,
Molama sarukkurane

Crack-ah maaritten, joker aayiten
Fuse-u pona pin,
bulb kaana switch-a theduren (oda oda oda ...)

Nadu raathiri,
ezhunthen paduthen ezhunthen
Oru maadhiri,
sirichen aluthen sirichen
Meenaa neendhuren neendhuren,
kadalum seralaye
Padaga poguren poguren
karaiyum seralaye

Crack-ah maaritten, joker aayiten
Kelvi kettu kettu
kelvi kuri pola nikkuren  (oda oda oda ...)

Freeya suthum pothu figure illaye
puducha figure-um ippo freeya illaye
Kaila bat-tu iruku ball-u illaye
Life pooram indha thollaye

Olagame speed-aa odi pogudhu
En vandi pancharaayi nikkudhu
Mokka piece-u kooda kindal pannudhu
Saami enna bangam pannudhu

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song?

The song conveys a sense of carefree joy and the excitement of living life to the fullest, reflecting the protagonist's vibrant personality.

How does this song fit into the movie's plot?

In Mayakkam Enna, this song highlights the protagonist's journey through life's ups and downs, emphasizing moments of joy and celebration.

Who is the singer and music director of the song?

The song is sung by Dhanush and composed by GV Prakash Kumar.

When was the song released?

The song was released on September 20, 2011.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Oda Oda Oda Dhooram, the protagonist expresses a carefree attitude towards life, celebrating the joy of living in the moment. The upbeat tempo and catchy lyrics create an infectious energy that resonates with listeners. This song serves as a reminder to embrace happiness and spontaneity, making it a perfect anthem for celebrations. Overall, it encapsulates the essence of youthful exuberance and the thrill of life's adventures.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Oda Oda Oda Dhooram from Mayakkam Enna is a vibrant celebration of life and energy, showcasing Dhanush's dynamic vocals paired with GV Prakash Kumar's infectious beats. This song perfectly captures the essence of youthful exuberance and the thrill of living in the moment. With its catchy lyrics and lively rhythm, it's a must-listen for anyone looking to uplift their spirits!
stanzaMeanings: Oda Oda Dhooram is a song by G.V.Prakash Kumar from the movie Mayakkam Enna.
Running away, running away, far away, I can't sing, can't sing, can't understand anything, everything is not clear...
When I roam freely, there's no figure, even the pretty figure is not free now. There's no ball in my hand, life is just a mess.
The whole world is speeding away, my vehicle is stuck. Even a useless piece is causing trouble. What is God doing to me?
I've turned into a crack, become a joker. I'm riding a two-horse vehicle in a crazy way.
On a beach, I'm alone, wandering around. On the road, I'm walking, feeling lost. I can't bear the burden, I'm not a donkey, I'm not a human, I'm just wandering aimlessly.
I've turned into a crack, become a joker. After the fuse blows, I'm looking for the switch to turn on the bulb (running away, running away, running away...).
When I roam freely, there's no figure...
In the middle of the night, I woke up, I got up. Like a fool, I laughed, I laughed. Meena is sleeping, the sea is merging. I'm going away, merging with the shore.
I've turned into a crack, become a joker. I'm standing like a question mark, asking questions (running away, running away, running away...).
When I roam freely, there's no figure, even the pretty figure is not free now. There's no ball in my hand, life is just a mess.
The whole world is speeding away, my vehicle is stuck. Even a useless piece is causing trouble. What is God doing to me?
